title: LY3437943, a novel triple GIP, GLP-1, and glucagon receptor agonist in people with type 2 diabetes: a phase 1b, multicentre, double-blind, placebo-controlled, randomised, multiple-ascending dose trial
study_design: phase 1b randomised double-blind placebo-controlled multiple-ascending-dose trial
key_results: Supported dose-dependent glucose and bodyweight effects suitable for phase 2 evaluation.
safety_findings: Gastrointestinal adverse events were prominent during dose escalation.
limitations: Small early-phase trial and short duration.
investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational and is not approved for public use.
